session_note: S106 - Owner full-batch 'make the whole game better, HIGHEST QUALITY'. P1 +25% match length (PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE 630->786, SCORE_TIER_STEP 210->262 lockstep). P2 chewer teeth -> funny triangular fangs (rainbow style, kept ORIGINAL pencil ivory+graphite). P3 HELGA whole-screen range (PRINCESS_SLAP_RANGE -> canvas diagonal) + reach VFX (graphite slap-shockwave hand->target, render-only). P4 NONET point-loss VISIBLE (progress bar -> local player's OWN score + leader ghost-tick + drop-flash; the owner saw 'almost full' because the bar shows the LEADER) + harsher (NONET_LOSER_MULT 0.5->0.4). P5 Voltkin procedural Graphics rig replacing the bitmap Sprite ('looping gif + square') - new voltkinPose.ts + creatureRenderer rewrite, keep voltkin-zap.png (Codex placeholder). Owner: 'full session batch approved' = unlock_source:user. FULL tier (Voltkin + multi-priority). Scoped via wf_3c8db072 (5 investigators + adversarial verify, both verdicts HOLD). PDR: .claude/plans/2026-06-25_PDR_Session_106_Polish_Balance_Voltkin.md
council_result: S106 scoped via background workflow wf_3c8db072 (profile->propose 5 items, adversarial-verify the NONET-display + Voltkin-render findings). Both verdicts HOLD high-confidence. NONET correction: the halving reducer is correct+tested; the main progress bar reads world.scoreProgress=max(scoreByPlayer)=the LEADER, so a non-leader's halving is invisible THERE (the per-player leaderboard + a 'descending aww' audio cue DO surface it) -> fix = bind the primary bar to the local player's own score. Voltkin confirmed: creatureRenderer.ts:421 new Sprite + per-tick texture swap = the 'looping gif'; voltkin-zap.png is the Codex characterSprite placeholder for 4 recipes + sync.test imports currentFrameKey -> keep them, don't naive-delete. Determinism guardrails: P1 single host-side threshold (replay-safe, no fixture pins 630); P3 range is sim-config (integer, pure fn of tick); P2/P4-display/P5 render-only (no world mutation, pose=f(synced state)).

priorities.label: S106 P1 - +25% match length: PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE 630->786, SCORE_TIER_STEP 210->262 (lockstep, exact thirds; HUNTER auto-scales to 589).
priorities.check_method: S106 P1 DONE (5482446). tsc 0; full vitest 1653/1653 (WIN now fires at score=786 per gameState.test log; scoring/session10/13/15 tier+win tests green; exact-thirds invariant 786=3x262 holds). PHASE_1_WIN_SCORE 630->786, SCORE_TIER_STEP 210->262 lockstep. No literal pins (symbolic imports); HUNTER auto-scales to 589. Replay-safe single host-side threshold (no fixture pins a 630-win). Runtime match-length is owner playtest.
priorities.objective: A match lasts ~25% longer (more points to win) so players can build + compete.
priorities.testing: tsc 0; full vitest green (no literal pins; tier-pulse loops under 120k caps; exact-thirds invariant green).

priorities.label: S106 P2 - Chewer teeth = funny downward triangular fangs (rainbow style) kept ORIGINAL pencil ivory+graphite.
priorities.check_method: S106 P2 DONE (5d7c469). tsc 0; chewerRenderer.test 10/10 (mock gained g.poly + the teeth-count assertion now counts poly); entry under cap. Replaced the 2 stiff g.rect incisors with 2 downward-pointing g.poly triangular fangs (rainbow's funny shape) kept in the chewer's ORIGINAL pencil style (ivory TOOTH_COLOR + graphite, NOT rainbow's flat white) with a comedic gap + slight crooked asymmetry. Render-only, no determinism impact. Runtime look is owner playtest.
priorities.objective: The chewer's two front teeth look funny like the rainbow's tooth.
priorities.scope: src/render/chewerRenderer.ts (drawChewer tooth-loop: 2 g.poly fangs, comedic gap + slight asymmetry, ivory TOOTH_COLOR + graphite outline).

priorities.label: S106 P3 - HELGA whole-screen range (PRINCESS_SLAP_RANGE -> Math.ceil(hypot(CANVAS_W,CANVAS_H))=2203) + reach VFX (graphite slap-shockwave hand->lastStrikePos, render-only).
priorities.check_method: S106 P3 DONE (b0cfb25). tsc 0; full vitest 1653/1653 (defender 7 + replay 21 + helgaPose 7 green); entry 598.7/750. PRINCESS_SLAP_RANGE 160 -> Math.ceil(hypot(CANVAS_W,CANVAS_H))=2203 (screen diagonal, integer for determinism). Targeting already picks nearest enemy -> screen-wide range = hunts ANY enemy chewer. princessRenderer.drawSlapReach draws a graphite slap-shockwave streak hand->lastStrikePos during FIRE (no-op when adjacent <24px so close slap unchanged); original CtCD style, NOT lightning. Render-only VFX. Replay byte-identical (fresh-run gate green); out-of-range IDLE test moved to (2400,2400) (>diagonal). Runtime look is owner playtest.
priorities.objective: HELGA slaps any enemy chewer anywhere on screen, and a far slap reads visually.
priorities.scope: src/constants.ts (PRINCESS_SLAP_RANGE), src/render/princessRenderer.ts (reach VFX), src/state/defenders/defenderLifecycle.test.ts (move out-of-range chewer beyond diagonal), src/state/save.replay.test.ts (comment).
priorities.testing: tsc 0; full vitest green (fix the IDLE-out-of-range test); determinism-safe (integer sim config).

priorities.label: S106 P4 - NONET point-loss VISIBLE (progress bar -> local OWN score + leader ghost-tick + drop-flash) + harsher (NONET_LOSER_MULT 0.5->0.4).
priorities.check_method: S106 P4 DONE (cc4a004). tsc 0; full vitest 1657/1657 (+4 ui.progress; sudoku 19 updated to ×0.4); entry 599.2/750. ROOT (verdict-confirmed): the halving reducer is correct; the main bar read world.scoreProgress=max(scoreByPlayer)=the LEADER, hiding the owner's own halving (the friend's ×2 kept the shared bar near-full). FIX: pure progressBarFractions(world) -> {own,leader}; drawProgress now tracks the LOCAL player's own score (the bar drops on a NONET loss) + a gold leader ghost-tick + a red drop-flash; WIN gate + HUNTER still read scoreProgress(max). HARSHER: NONET_LOSER_MULT 0.5->0.4 (keep 40%). ui.progress.test pins own-tracks-localPlayerId + own-DROPS-on-NONET-loss. Render display is owner playtest; the scoring math is unit-verified.
priorities.objective: Losing a NONET visibly cuts YOUR points (was hidden by the leader-max bar) and hurts more.
priorities.scope: src/render/ui.ts (drawProgress: own-score bar + leader ghost-tick + drop-flash), src/state/sudokuEvent.ts (NONET_LOSER_MULT 0.5->0.4), sudokuEvent.test.ts (loser expectations) + a display regression test.
priorities.testing: tsc 0; full vitest green; WIN gate + HUNTER stay on scoreProgress(max).

priorities.scope: src/render/voltkinPose.ts (NEW), src/render/voltkinPose.test.ts (NEW), src/render/creatureRenderer.ts (REWRITE draw path), src/render/creatureRenderer.test.ts (UPDATE). Do NOT delete voltkin-zap.png / currentFrameKey without import-graph grep.
